title: Parent — Overview & My Children
content:
Overview


The Parent Portal allows parents to monitor their children's academic progress. The Overview page provides a quick summary, and the My Children page gives detailed views for each linked child.



Overview Page


The Overview dashboard shows a summary across all linked children with four stat cards:


  • Children: Number of children linked to the parent's account
  • Enrolled Subjects: Total subjects across all children
  • Assignments: Total assignments sent to all children
  • Announcements: Number of active school announcements

A Recent Activity feed shows the latest updates across all children, such as new grades posted, assignments received, and enrolment changes.



My Children Page


This page provides detailed views for each linked child using sub-tabs. Each child has their own tab displaying their name. Clicking a child's tab shows:


  • Child's name and grade level
  • Enrolled subjects: List of subjects the child is currently enrolled in
  • Recent grades: Latest grade entries across subjects
  • Upcoming assignments: Recent assignments from teachers

If a parent has multiple children at the same school, they can switch between them using the sub-tabs. Each child's data is completely separate.



Navigation


The sidebar menu provides access to all parent pages:


  • Overview: Summary dashboard for all children
  • My Children: Detailed per-child views
  • Grades: View grades by child, term, and year
  • Assignments: View assignments sent by teachers
  • Report Cards: Generate official report cards by term
  • Announcements: Read school-wide announcements
  • Calendar: View school events and important dates
  • Self-Study: Track independent learning progress
  • Settings: Profile, password, 2FA, and theme preferences


Notification Bell


A notification bell in the top-right corner shows alerts for:


  • New grades posted for any linked child
  • New assignments from teachers
  • School announcements

Click the bell to view recent notifications. Use "Clear all" to mark all as read.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "The Overview shows a summary across all your children. Click My Children for detailed per-child views."
  • "If you have multiple children, use the sub-tabs to switch between them."
  • "The notification bell alerts you when new grades or assignments are posted."
  • "If you don't see one of your children, they may not be linked to your account — contact the school admin."
